parameters.query:
-- Fetch unchecked bid expectations older than measurement window
SELECT be.id, be.ad_id, be.old_bid, be.new_bid, be.action,
       be.expected_metric, be.expected_direction, be.baseline_value,
       be.measurement_window_hours, be.created_at
FROM bid_expectations be
WHERE be.checked = FALSE
  AND be.created_at < NOW() - (be.measurement_window_hours || ' hours')::INTERVAL
ORDER BY be.created_at ASC
LIMIT 100

-- Get current stats for all ads with unchecked expectations
SELECT s.ad_id,
       SUM(s.money) AS total_spend,
       SUM(s.clicks) AS total_clicks,
       SUM(s.shows) AS total_shows,
       CASE WHEN SUM(s.clicks) > 0 THEN SUM(s.money) / SUM(s.clicks) ELSE 0 END AS current_cpc,
       CASE WHEN SUM(s.shows) > 0 THEN (SUM(s.clicks)::DECIMAL / SUM(s.shows)) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS current_ctr
FROM ad_stats s
WHERE s.date >= CURRENT_DATE - 1
  AND s.ad_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ad_id FROM bid_expectations WHERE checked = FALSE)
GROUP BY s.ad_id

SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads
FROM leads
WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
  AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
GROUP BY param5

-- Update expectation with outcome
UPDATE bid_expectations SET
  outcome = '{{ $json.outcome }}',
  actual_value = {{ $json.actual_value || 'NULL' }},
  checked = TRUE,
  checked_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.expectation_id }};

-- Update escalation_failures on teaser if outcome is failure
UPDATE teasers SET
  escalation_failures = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.outcome }}' = 'failure' THEN escalation_failures + 1 ELSE escalation_failures END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE ad_id = {{ $json.ad_id }};
